project.name: stickman_motivation_part_1
project.description: Stickman motivational short-form video scenes for social media

scenes.name: awake_at_2am
scenes.motion_prompt: Foot tapping rhythmically, head tilting slightly side to side, worried expression, minimal smooth 2D animation, no camera movement.
scenes.negative_prompt: realistic human, extra limbs, distorted stickman, flickering, morphing body, blurry, text errors
scenes.voiceover: You are lying awake at 2 AM again. Your brain is replaying everything you did not do today.
scenes.notes: Opening scene. Conveys restlessness. Slow zoom-in with slight right pan.

scenes.name: getting_up_anyway
scenes.motion_prompt: Stickman slowly sits up from bed, stretches arms upward, takes a deep breath. Smooth minimal motion, 2D animation style.
scenes.negative_prompt: realistic human, extra limbs, distorted body, flickering, morphing, complex background
scenes.voiceover: But tonight, instead of scrolling, you get up.
scenes.notes: Transition scene. Zoom-out effect for sense of perspective shift.

scenes.name: writing_goals
scenes.motion_prompt: Stickman sitting at desk, pen moving across notebook, focused posture, small light bulb glowing above head. Smooth looping animation.
scenes.negative_prompt: realistic human, extra limbs, distorted body, text errors, flickering, morphing
scenes.voiceover: You write down three things you will do tomorrow. Just three. That is enough.
scenes.notes: Action scene. Slow zoom-in with left pan. Longer fade-out for ending feel.
